title: Topstep vs Tradeify (2026): Phase-Shift Trail vs Archetype-Inverse Consistency
description: Topstep vs Tradeify — Topstep ships one product (Combine→XFA) with a firm-imposed intraday→EOD phase-shift; Tradeify ships three programs (Growth, Select, Lightning) with archetype-inverse consistency you pick at signup and uniform EOD trail across the lifecycle. Same $3K-DD ballpark, opposite philosophies on where the choice complexity sits. Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: Topstep vs Tradeify (2026): Phase-Shift Trail vs Archetype-Inverse Consistency
og.description: One product two phases vs three products one phase. Topstep shifts the rule mechanic on you mid-lifecycle; Tradeify makes you pick the rule archetype at signup and keeps it uniform.
